recommendations.title: Peninsula
recommendations.overview: A soldier and his team battle hordes of post-apocalyptic zombies in the wastelands of the Korean Peninsula.

recommendations.title: Monolith
recommendations.overview: A mother and her son plan a surprise visit to Los Angeles to see her husband/his father. Halfway there they get into a terrible accident in the middle of nowhere and now must fight to survive.

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: The Fourth Protocol

recommendations.title: The Beast from 20,000 Fathoms
recommendations.overview: The controlled explosion of an atomic bomb in the Arctic Circle awakens a frozen dinosaur that will wreak havoc in New York City.
